user.title: Connect to SplitPro
user.description: Enter your self-hosted SplitPro URL and the HA API key you added to your .env file.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach SplitPro. Check the URL and that the server is running.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key. Make sure HA_API_KEY in your .env matches what you entered.
error.user_not_found: No SplitPro user found with that email address.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This SplitPro account is already configured.

add_expense.name: Add Expense
add_expense.description: Create a new expense in SplitPro.

expense_name.name: Name
expense_name.description: Description of the expense (e.g. 'Dinner at Mario\'s')

expense_amount.name: Amount
expense_amount.description: Total amount in major currency units (e.g. 45.50)

split_equally.name: Split Equally
split_equally.description: Split the expense equally among all participants

group_id.name: Group ID
group_id.description: Optional: SplitPro group ID to attach this expense to

paid_by_email.name: Paid By
paid_by_email.description: Email of who paid (defaults to your account email)

expense_date.name: Date
expense_date.description: Date of the expense (YYYY-MM-DD, defaults to today)

expense_id.name: Expense ID
expense_id.description: The ID of the expense to delete
